Khavatari Kashu:
We have to interrupt their ritual somehow, right? If we go back, we'll just be running away, won't we? Actually, I couldn't interfere with their ritual at all on my own.
But now that you're here, they seem to be reacting differently. I think they're acting to your power.
Sooner or later, they'll stop their ritual and wake up. From what I've observed, it takes some time for them to wake up from the ritual.
Perhaps they'll wake up one by one at regular intervals, so it's to your advantage to quickly kill the first one before the others wake up.
